# .github/workflows/poetra-signal.yml
name: POETRA XAUUSD Signal Bot

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "*/15 6-16 * * 1-5"   # tiap 15 mnt, 13:00-23:00 WIB, Sen-Jum
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  signal:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 6
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Jalankan bot sinyal
        env:
          TWELVE_DATA_KEY: ${{ secrets.TWELVE_DATA_KEY }}
          TELEGRAM_TOKEN:  ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
          SYMBOLS: ${{ vars.SYMBOLS }}
          MIN_CONFIDENCE: ${{ vars.MIN_CONFIDENCE }}
          SEND_WAIT: ${{ vars.SEND_WAIT }}
        run: python bot.py
      - name: Simpan signals.json ke repo (untuk dashboard HP)
        run: |
          git config user.name "poetra-bot"
          git config user.email "bot@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add signals.json || true
          git commit -m "update signals" || echo "tidak ada perubahan"
          git push || echo "push dilewati"
